indicators.name: Large windows
indicators.rationale: Large windows allow natural light to enter, reducing the need for artificial lighting.

indicators.name: Dining tables
indicators.rationale: Dining tables can be repurposed as workstations, providing ample surface area for computer work.

indicators.name: Bookshelves
indicators.rationale: Bookshelves provide storage for reference materials and personal items, enhancing productivity.

indicators.name: Ceiling beams
indicators.rationale: Ceiling beams add character and warmth to the space, creating a cozy atmosphere conducive to focused work.

reasoning_summary: The space is well-suited for solo computer work due to its large windows, versatile dining tables, organized bookshelves, and warm, inviting atmosphere.
